---
title: "Solution 1D — Manual 5-fold cross-validation"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-tools: true
---

**Instructor notes:** Manual loop should approximate `cv.glmnet` fold-averaged error. Reflection prompts are for discussion.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(glmnet)
```

```{r data}
set.seed(123)
n <- 150
gene_names <- c("GeneA", "GeneB", "GeneC", "GeneD", "GeneE", "GeneF", "GeneG", "GeneH", "GeneI", "GeneJ")
gene_data <- matrix(rnorm(n * 10), nrow = n)
colnames(gene_data) <- gene_names
trait <- -0.5 * gene_data[, "GeneA"] + 0.8 * gene_data[, "GeneB"] + rnorm(n, sd = 0.3)
x <- gene_data
y <- trait
```

```{r manual-cv}
set.seed(42)
k <- 5
folds <- sample(rep(1:k, length.out = n))
cv_rmse <- numeric(k)

dat <- data.frame(y = y, x)
for (i in seq_len(k)) {
  val <- folds == i
  m <- lm(y ~ ., data = dat[!val, ])
  pred <- predict(m, newdata = dat[val, ])
  cv_rmse[i] <- sqrt(mean((y[val] - pred)^2))
}

manual_mean <- mean(cv_rmse)
manual_mean
```

```{r glmnet-cv}
cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(x, y, alpha = 0, nfolds = k, foldid = folds)
cv_fit$cvm[which.min(cv_fit$cvm)]
```

```{r reflection}
cat(
  "Reflection prompts for students:\n",
  "1. Did you fit preprocessing inside each fold?\n",
  "2. Are fold IDs shuffled before splitting?\n",
  "3. What breaks if you tune and evaluate on the same rows?\n",
  "4. How many lines did tidymodels save on Day 2?\n",
  "5. Where could mouse Individual IDs leak in microbiome data?\n"
)
```

```{r session, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
